title: PMN- 01a - Isolation of Human PMN from Buffy Coat

materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"4tsfd","text":"- Ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid disodium salt dihydrate: Sigma AldrichCatalog #ED2SS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"djrb5","text":"- Ficoll Paque PLUS: Ge HealthcareCatalog #17144003-500 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7j95k","text":"- Fetal Bovine Serum (FBS): EuroCloneCatalog #ECS0180L-500 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fcp75","text":"-RPMI 1640: EuroCloneCatalog #ECM 0495L- 500 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"caan5","text":"- NaCl: Sigma AldrichCatalog #S9625","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aqfne","text":"- NH4Cl: Merck Serono GmbHCatalog #1.01145.1000","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c0te9","text":"- KHCO3: Merck Serono GmbHCatalog #1.04854.500","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b4ppp","text":"- Acetic Acid 100%: Sigma AldrichCatalog #A6283","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8mvi9","text":"- Genitian violet 1%: Marco VitiCatalog #not available","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eag8p","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5hpa4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"513u7","text":"Optical Microscope","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place 5 mL of venus blood from BUFFY COAT into 10 ml volume centrifuge tube.
Add 2 mL of SOLUTION- 03 and mix well drawing in and out of a pipette. SOLUTION- 03 - Dextran solution 5% by Farmacologia Medica
Incubate in the DARK for 00:45:00 at 37 °C
Place 3 mL of Fycoll-HyPaque media solution into a 10 ml volume centrifuge tube.

Slowly and carefully layer the supernatant from blood/dextran mixture onto the Fycoll-HyPaque media solution. Important: when layering the sample, do not mix the Fycoll-HyPlaque media solution and supernatant
Centrifuge at 400 x g, Room temperature, 30 minutes , no break Allegra AVANTI 30 (Centrifuge, Beckman Coulter, Beckman Italy)
Draw off the mononuclear cell layer at the Ficoll/plasma interface along with plasma and Ficoll media, leaving the white cell layer of granulocytes above the red blood cell layer undisturbed.

Resuspend the remaining cell layer in 5 mL of NaCl 0.15 Molarity (M) ( SOLUTION- 01 )and centrifuge at 400 x g, Room temperature, 5 minutes SOLUTION- 01 - Sodium Chloride (NaCl) solution by Farmacologia Medica Allegra AVANTI 30 (Centrifuge, Beckman Coulter, Beckman Italy)
Aspirate the supernatant with a plastic Pasteur pipette.
Lyse remaining red blood cells in 5 mL of hypotonic Lysis Buffer ( SOLUTION- 06 ) for 00:05:00 SOLUTION- 06 - Lysis Buffer by Elisa Storelli
Centrifuge at 400 x g, Room temperature, 5 minutes Allegra AVANTI 30 (Centrifuge, Beckman Coulter, Beckman Italy)
Aspirate the supernatant with a plastic Pasteur pipette.
Resuspend the pellet in 5 mL NaCl 0.15 Molarity (M) ( SOLUTION- 01 ) SOLUTION- 01 - Sodium Chloride (NaCl) solution by Farmacologia Medica
Centrifuge at 400 x g, Room temperature, 5 minutes Allegra AVANTI 30 (Centrifuge, Beckman Coulter, Beckman Italy)
Aspirate the supernatant with a plastic Pasteur pipette.

Resuspend the cell pellet in 5 mL NaCl 0.15 Molarity (M) ( SOLUTION- 01 )for manula cell counting with Türk solution (follow protocol CELL COUNT- 02). SOLUTION- 01 - Sodium Chloride (NaCl) solution by Farmacologia Medica SOLUTION- 08 - Türk solution by Farmacologia Medica

OPTIONAL STEP Cell viability can be checked using protocol CELL COUNT- 03 in the automated cell counter with Trypan Blue solution. SOLUTION- 09 - Trypan Blue solution by Farmacologia Medica Cellometer Auto T4 (Automated Cell Counter, Nexcelom Bioscience, Euroclone)

OPTIONAL STEP If needed, check the purity of PMN suspension by using morphological parameters of the flow cytometer. For this test 0,5 x10 6 PMN in 500 µL of PBS (SOLUTION- 02) are enough. SOLUTION- 02 - Phosphate Buffered Saline (PBS) by Farmacologia Medica BD FACS Celesta (Flow Cytometer, Becton Dickinson, Milan Italy BD)
EXPECTED RESULTS VIABILITY: the expeted viability by Tripan Blue shuold be ≥90% CELL YIELD: ± 6 x10 6 cells starting from 1 mL of Buffy Coat
creator: Farmacologia Medica
